win_condition: After the round in which at least one player completes a horizontal line on their wall, the player with the most points wins.
tiebreaker: Player with more completed horizontal lines wins.

categories.label: Tile Placement Points
categories.description: Points earned during the game when placing tiles on the wall (adjacency scoring).

categories.label: Completed Horizontal Rows
categories.description: 2 bonus points per completed horizontal row of 5 tiles.

categories.label: Completed Vertical Columns
categories.description: 7 bonus points per completed vertical column of 5 tiles.

categories.label: Completed Colors
categories.description: 10 bonus points for each color where all 5 tiles are placed on the wall.

categories.label: Floor Line Penalties
categories.description: Negative points from tiles that fell to the floor line during the game.
